## 1 — Arthur Humeau | Brand Appart | brandappart.com
*Co-Founder and CEO/Creative Director · Design studio for Europe's tech startups · Transformed from freelance product design into externalised design department · London/Paris-based*

**Subject:** The research before every Brand Appart branding sprint

Hi Arthur,

Building Brand Appart from a freelance practice into an externalised design department for Europe's tech companies in four years is a real achievement. Every new client sprint you take on requires the same upfront groundwork: understanding their market position, their competitors' visual language, their audience signals, their sector context. All before a single logo concept is sketched.

That pre-sprint research typically runs 4 to 8 hours per client. For a studio that promises fast, robust brand systems, that time is coming directly out of your delivery speed.

Stratledger's Starter tier ($149) automates that initial research brief so your team can launch each sprint from a fully informed baseline without the manual dig.

Given the pace Brand Appart operates at, this might be worth a look. Happy to share a sample brief.

**LINKEDIN CONNECTION REQUEST (under 300 chars):**
Arthur, I work with boutique creative studios helping them cut the pre-client research grind. Saw the Brand Identity feature on Brand Appart and was impressed by how you've scaled the studio. Would love to connect.

---
